comment: Plan matched what I would have done; over-buffered C2 slightly.
Loved the explicit Tier-1 protection narrative; clipping note was crucial.
Allocated too many cold-chain trucks for the demand level; left capacity idle.
Allocator handled the spike well but driver assignment to D-2 was risky given his hours.
Clean run; trend chart helped me see we're trending down on C2.
Approved the escalation; I'd have wanted clearer alternate-route options.
